commit.message:
Skip running NTLM tests on Windows versions where NTLM is removed

NTLM is removed from Windows 11 24H2 and Windows Server 2025 [1],
causing the NTLMHeadTest and TestTransparentNTLM tests to fail on these
platforms.  This patch adds an annotation to skip these tests on Windows
11 and on Windows Server 2025.

[1] https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/topic/upcoming-changes-to-ntlmv1-in-windows-11-version-24h2-and-windows-server-2025-c0554217-cdbc-420f-b47c-e02b2db49b2e
